__NOTOC__
== Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! ==
This is the wiki dedicated to the [[Aelaki language]].

Aelaki is a constructed language created by Immanuelle. It is spoken on the planet ngorno.

This wiki also covers Illish

==Getting started with learning Aelaki==

# Learn the [[non-concatenative morphology]]
# Learn [[basic syntax]] first
# Learn the [[case system]]
# [[Interjections/particles]]
# Learn [[adjectives]]
# Learn [[verbs]]
## [[Active verbs]]
## [[Transitive verbs]]
## [[stative verbs]]

[[Category:Git synced pages]]
